factors.summary: The company is experiencing favorable pricing in certain segments.

evidence.text: Lower Textron Aviation revenues of $21 million, primarily due to lower volume and mix of $46 million, largely reflecting lower commercial turboprop volume, partially offset by favorable pricing of $25 million.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Favorable pricing in certain segments indicates a positive trend.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting due to changes in product lines and pricing.

evidence.text: Revenues increased $41 million in the first nine months of 2018, compared with the first nine months of 2017, largely driven by increases in the Industrial, Textron Aviation and Bell segments, partially offset by lower revenues at the Textron Systems segment.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed signals from shifting revenue mix across segments.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is mixed across segments.

evidence.text: Revenues increased $41 million in the first nine months of 2018, compared with the first nine months of 2017, largely driven by increases in the Industrial, Textron Aviation and Bell segments, partially offset by lower revenues at the Textron Systems segment.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed organic growth across different segments.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are declining in some segments and increasing in others.

evidence.text: Lower Industrial revenues of $112 million, primarily due to the disposition of the Tools and Test Equipment product line described in the Segment Analysis section below.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Declining unit volumes in some segments indicate a negative trend.

factors.summary: End markets are showing mixed momentum with some segments growing and others declining.

evidence.text: Revenues increased $41 million in the first nine months of 2018, compared with the first nine months of 2017, largely driven by increases in the Industrial, Textron Aviation and Bell segments, partially offset by lower revenues at the Textron Systems segment.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed momentum across end markets with some growing and others declining.
